'''âl-l-ch''' ('''shalalach''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nakedize|nakedize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nakedize|nakedize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-l-ch
|-
! Lemma
| shalalach
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilalach|thilalach]] || [[word:jilalach|jilalach]] || [[word:shilalach|shilalach]] || [[word:kilalach|kilalach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulalach|thuthulalach]] || [[word:jujulalach|jujulalach]] || [[word:shushulalach|shushulalach]] || [[word:kukulalach|kukulalach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulalach|thulalach]] || [[word:julalach|julalach]] || [[word:shulalach|shulalach]] || [[word:kulalach|kulalach]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulalach|thulalach]] || [[word:julalach|julalach]] || [[word:shulalach|shulalach]] || [[word:kulalach|kulalach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelalach|thelalach]] || [[word:jelalach|jelalach]] || [[word:shelalach|shelalach]] || [[word:kelalach|kelalach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholalach|thotholalach]] || [[word:jojolalach|jojolalach]] || [[word:shosholalach|shosholalach]] || [[word:kokolalach|kokolalach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholalach|tholalach]] || [[word:jolalach|jolalach]] || [[word:sholalach|sholalach]] || [[word:kolalach|kolalach]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholalach|tholalach]] || [[word:jolalach|jolalach]] || [[word:sholalach|sholalach]] || [[word:kolalach|kolalach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlalach|thĂŠlalach]] || [[word:jĂŠlalach|jĂŠlalach]] || [[word:shĂŠlalach|shĂŠlalach]] || [[word:kĂŠlalach|kĂŠlalach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalalach|thathalalach]] || [[word:jajalalach|jajalalach]] || [[word:shashalalach|shashalalach]] || [[word:kakalalach|kakalalach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalalach|thalalach]] || [[word:jalalach|jalalach]] || [[word:shalalach|shalalach]] || [[word:kalalach|kalalach]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalalach|thalalach]] || [[word:jalalach|jalalach]] || [[word:shalalach|shalalach]] || [[word:kalalach|kalalach]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalalach|shalalach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalalach|goshalalach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalalach|gokishalalach]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalalachnĂŒ|shalalachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalalachnknĂŒ|goshalalachnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalachnĂŒ|gokishalalachnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalalachshĂ«|shalalachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalalachnkshĂ«|goshalalachnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalalachshĂ«|gokishalalachshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalachro|shalalachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalachnkro|goshalalachnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalachro|gokishalalachro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalachmu|shalalachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalachnkmu|goshalalachnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalachmu|gokishalalachmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalalachsher|shalalachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalalachnksher|goshalalachnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalalachsher|gokishalalachsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalalachng|shalalachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalalachnkng|goshalalachnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalalachng|gokishalalachng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalalachya|shalalachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalalachnkya|goshalalachnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalalachya|gokishalalachya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalalachyam|shalalachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalalachnkyam|goshalalachnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalalachyam|gokishalalachyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalachnĂŒshĂ«|shalalachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalachnknĂŒshĂ«|goshalalachnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalachnĂŒshĂ«|gokishalalachnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalachnĂŒro|shalalachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalachnknĂŒro|goshalalachnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalachnĂŒro|gokishalalachnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalachnĂŒmu|shalalachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalachnknĂŒmu|goshalalachnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalachnĂŒmu|gokishalalachnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalachshĂ«nĂŒ|shalalachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalachnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshalalachnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalachshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishalalachshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalachshĂ«ro|shalalachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalachnkshĂ«ro|goshalalachnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalachshĂ«ro|gokishalalachshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalachshĂ«mu|shalalachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalachnkshĂ«mu|goshalalachnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalachshĂ«mu|gokishalalachshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalachronĂŒ|shalalachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalachnkronĂŒ|goshalalachnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalachronĂŒ|gokishalalachronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalachroshĂ«|shalalachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalachnkroshĂ«|goshalalachnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalachroshĂ«|gokishalalachroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalachromu|shalalachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalachnkromu|goshalalachnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalachromu|gokishalalachromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalachmunĂŒ|shalalachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalachnkmunĂŒ|goshalalachnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalachmunĂŒ|gokishalalachmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalachmushĂ«|shalalachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalachnkmushĂ«|goshalalachnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalachmushĂ«|gokishalalachmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalachmuro|shalalachmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalachnkmuro|goshalalachnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalachmuro|gokishalalachmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
